description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular design with a predominantly olive green exterior accented by matte black panels. The front is equipped with a wide, tinted visor that offers full-face coverage, seamlessly integrated into the helmet's geometric contours. Subtle surface wear and scuff marks suggest it is built for rugged use, possibly in tactical or urban environments. The sides display circular, recessed details that may serve as attachment points or decorative elements. The rear and top are reinforced with additional black plating, enhancing both protection and visual contrast. The overall construction appears solid and utilitarian, prioritizing durability and comprehensive head coverage.
description: A rugged olive green and black helmet with a full-face tinted visor and angular, reinforced design, showing signs of wear.
description_view_0: The rear view highlights the helmet's broad, black top panel and angular green sides, with no visible visor.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the circular side detail, the green and black color split, and the edge of the tinted visor.
description_view_2: The front view showcases the full-face tinted visor, angular chin guard, and symmetrical green and black color scheme.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with the circular detail and visor edge visible, emphasizing the helmet's symmetry.
attribute_graphic_design: solid olive green with matte black panels and subtle surface wear; no additional graphics or motifs
